signals.headline: **XRP regulatory clarity:** Ripple won its SEC case in August 2025 with a $125 million settlement, and the SEC and CFTC
signals.raw: **XRP regulatory clarity:** Ripple won its SEC case in August 2025 with a $125 million settlement, and the SEC and CFTC jointly classified XRP as a digital commodity in March 2026.[1] A CLARITY Act markup was expected in late April 2026.[1]
